title: hieracium alpinum subsp. melanocephalum
intro: Hieracium alpinum subsp. melanocephalum, also known as Alpine Hawkweed, is a perennial plant species belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae) and is native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The medicinal properties of Alpine Hawkweed include its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve symptoms of diarrhea, as well as its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of the plant include its potential to treat digestive issues, such as irritable bowel syndrome, and its ability to boost the immune system. Alpine Hawkweed is traditionally used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures to support digestive health and relieve symptoms of various gastrointestinal disorders.
